# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'IMAGE_TAG', defaultValue: 'latest', description: 'Docker image tag')
        string(name: 'REGISTRY_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Docker registry URL')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Inputs') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Validate registry URL format
                    if (!REGISTRY_URL.matches(/^https?:\/\/[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+(:[0-9]+)?$/)) {
                        error("Invalid registry URL format.")
                    }
                    // Validate image tag
                    if (!IMAGE_TAG.matches(/^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+$/)) {
                        error("Invalid image tag format.")
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Build the Docker image
                    sh "docker build -t ${REGISTRY_URL}/my-image:${IMAGE_TAG} ."
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Push Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Login to Docker registry securely
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'docker-credentials', usernameVariable: 'DOCKER_USERNAME', passwordVariable: 'DOCKER_PASSWORD')]) {
                        sh "echo $DOCKER_PASSWORD | docker login ${REGISTRY_URL} -u $DOCKER_USERNAME --password-stdin"
                        // Push the Docker image
                        sh "docker push ${REGISTRY_URL}/my-image:${IMAGE_TAG}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            // Clean up Docker images
            sh "docker rmi ${REGISTRY_URL}/my-image:${IMAGE_TAG} || true"
        }
    }
}
